description: IrcManager — lifecycle for local ergo IRC daemon (per-project data dir) and WeeChat zellij tab; builds WeeChat auto-connect command; injects OIDC auth-script when credentials available

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager.__init__
key_classes_functions.purpose: Load state from state.json; store zellij session + project dir

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager.daemon_start
key_classes_functions.purpose: Write per-project ergo.yaml (patched port, no IPv6/TLS), copy languages dir, inject auth-script; Popen ergo; record PID

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager._inject_auth_script
key_classes_functions.purpose: Copy ergo_auth_script.py + auth_script_config.json; patch ergo.yaml auth-script enabled + require-sasl

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager.daemon_stop
key_classes_functions.purpose: Kill ergo by stored PID only (not by port — avoid hitting unrelated ergo)

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager.start_weechat
key_classes_functions.purpose: Pre-check connectivity; new zellij tab 'weechat'; record tab name+pane id

key_classes_functions.name: IrcManager.build_weechat_cmd
key_classes_functions.purpose: Compose full WeeChat startup shell command (/server add, SASL if creds, /script load plugin)
